name: agentrouter
description: Route AI agents to paid API/data services, quote calls, invoke providers, and return verified evidence.
long_description: AgentRouter is a local Claude Desktop extension for connecting agents to the Agent Native Data Network. It exposes structured MCP tools for capability routing, quote-before-pay, provider invocation, and evidence/trust metadata. The main agent remains responsible for understanding the user's request; AgentRouter handles service discovery, routing, payment adapter calls, verification, and evidence trace generation.

tools.name: agentrouter_request
tools.description: Preferred structured request tool: route, quote, invoke, verify, and return AgentRouter evidence.

tools.name: agentrouter_quote
tools.description: Preview selected provider, request input, price, and budget guard without invoking the provider.

tools.name: agentrouter_capabilities
tools.description: List AgentRouter capability schemas so the main agent can create structured requests.

tools.name: agentrouter_ask
tools.description: Fallback natural-language demo tool for clients that cannot produce structured requests.

agent_router_url.title: AgentRouter URL
agent_router_url.description: AgentRouter registry URL. Use the hosted demo URL or your local AgentRouter server URL.

max_price_usdc.title: Default Max Price
max_price_usdc.description: Default per-call USDC budget used by the natural-language fallback tool.
